channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BAJAJFINSV] Bajaj Finserv Ltd. to Approve Q4 & FY26 Audited Financial Results on April 30, 2026
item.description:
Bajaj Finserv Ltd. has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on April 30, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31 March 2026. The meeting will also recommend dividends on equity shares, if any, for the financial year ended 31 March 2026. The trading window for dealing in the securities of the company is closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives/dependents from 1 April 2026 till 2 May 2026.

  • Bajaj Finserv Ltd. to approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results on April 30, 2026
  • Recommendation of dividend on equity shares, if any, for FY26
  • Trading window closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives/dependents from April 1, 2026 to May 2, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BAJAJ FINSERV LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CUPIDALBV] Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Independent Director, Ajay Gandeja, Resigns Due to Pre-Occupancy
item.description:
Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd announced the resignation of their Independent Director, Mr. Ajay Gandeja, due to his pre-occupancy. The resignation was filed with the Stock Exchange on April 02, 2026, although there was a delay in submission which was inadvertent. The resignation letter along with confirmation from the Director stating that there are no material reasons for resignation other than those mentioned in the resignation letter has been submitted.

  • Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd Independent Director, Ajay Gandeja, resigns.
  • Resignation due to pre-occupancy.
  • Resignation filed with the Stock Exchange on April 02, 2026.
  • Delay in submission was inadvertent.
  • No material reasons for resignation other than those mentioned in the resignation letter.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [QLL] Qualitek Labs Promoters Confirm No Encumbrance on Shares in FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Qualitek Labs Ltd. announces that its promoters, including Antaryami Nayak, Alok Kumar Agarwal, Kamal Grover, and TIC Services Private Limited, have not created any encumbrance on their shares in the company during the financial year ended 31st March 2026. This declaration was submitted by Antaryami Nayak pursuant to Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Qualitek Labs promoters confirm no encumbrance on shares for FY 2025-2026
  • Antaryami Nayak, Alok Kumar Agarwal, Kamal Grover, and TIC Services Private Limited included in the declaration
  • Declaration submitted pursuant to SEBI regulations
  • No indirect encumbrance on shares reported
  • Information submitted for records

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Qualitek Labs Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [ARCEEIN] Arcee Industries Promoter Gupta Declares Unencumbered Share Holdings in Regulation 31(4) Disclosure
item.description:
As on March 31, 2026, Ramesh Chander Gupta, Promoter of Arcee Industries Ltd, has disclosed that the entire promoter’s holdings of 24.58% Equity Shares, consisting of co-promoter’s and PACs shareholdings and his shareholdings, have not been encumbered directly or indirectly during the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Ramesh Chander Gupta, Promoter of Arcee Industries Ltd, disclosed unencumbered share holdings
  • Disclosure made under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011
  • Entire promoter’s holdings of 24.58% Equity Shares not encumbered directly or indirectly
  • Disclosure includes co-promoter’s and PACs shareholdings
  • Disclosure made for the financial year ended March 31, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ARCEE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [JMFINANCIL] JM Financial Ltd Receives 'Leader' ESG Rating of 73 from NSE Sustainability Ratings
item.description:
JM Financial Ltd has received an Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) score of 73 under the 'Leader' category from NSE Sustainability Ratings and Analytics Limited. This rating is based on the data pertaining to the financial year 2024-25. Notably, the company had not engaged NSE Sustainability Ratings for ESG Rating, and it has been independently assigned based on the information available in the public domain.

  • JM Financial Ltd receives an ESG score of 73 under the 'Leader' category
  • The rating is assigned by NSE Sustainability Ratings and Analytics Limited
  • The rating is based on the financial year 2024-25 data
  • The company did not engage NSE Sustainability Ratings for ESG Rating
  • The rating is independently assigned based on publicly available information

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JM FINANCIAL LTD.-$ | Category: ESG Rating

item.title: [SRSOLTD] Silicon Rental Solutions Ltd Clarifies Price Movement Under SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Silicon Rental Solutions Ltd, in response to a letter seeking clarification under Regulation 30(10) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, has stated that there is no pending price-sensitive information that could have led to the significant movement in the price of its shares. The company ensures that all required information/announcements will be duly disclosed to the stock exchange(s) as and when required.

  • Silicon Rental Solutions Ltd clarifies price movement under SEBI regulations.
  • No pending price-sensitive information that could have led to significant movement in share price.
  • Company ensures stock exchange(s) will be duly informed of all required information/announcements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Silicon Rental Solutions Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Commissions Fifth Phase of 33.334 MW BESS Project in Rajasthan
item.description:
ACME Solar Holdings Limited, through its subsidiary ACME Sun Power Private Limited, has commissioned the fifth phase of 33.334 MW/160.48 MWh out of 300 MW/1409.34 MWh capacity of Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Project. The project is located at Village: Badi Sid, Tehsil-Bap, Dist: Phalodi and Jodhpur, Rajasthan. The Commercial operation date (COD) for the stated phase-V is April 08, 2026. With this, ACME Sun Power Private Limited has achieved a commissioned capacity of 166.670 MW / 802.460 MWh out of 300 MW/1409.34 MWh.

  • ACME Solar commissions fifth phase of 33.334 MW/160.48 MWh BESS project in Rajasthan.
  • Project located at Village: Badi Sid, Tehsil-Bap, Dist: Phalodi and Jodhpur, Rajasthan.
  • ACME Sun Power Private Limited has achieved a commissioned capacity of 166.670 MW / 802.460 MWh out of 300 MW/1409.34 MWh.
  • Commercial operation date (COD) for the stated phase-V is April 08, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Commissions Fifth Phase of 76 MW BESS Project in Rajasthan, Achieving 247 MW Capacity
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACME Solar Holdings Limited, through its subsidiary ACME Suryodaya Private Limited, has successfully commissioned the fifth phase of a 76 MW / 160.512 MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) project in Rajasthan. This achievement brings the total commissioned capacity to 247 MW / 521.652 MWh out of the total 285 MW / 601.904 MWh capacity. The Commercial Operation Date (COD) for the fifth phase is April 08, 2026.

  • ACME Solar commissions fifth phase of 76 MW BESS project in Rajasthan
  • Achieved a total commissioned capacity of 247 MW / 521.652 MWh out of 285 MW / 601.904 MWh
  • Project located at Village: Sanwara and Mehar Nagar, Tehsil-Pokhran, Dist: Jaisalmer, Rajasthan
  • Commercial Operation Date (COD) for the fifth phase is April 08, 2026
  • ACME Suryodaya Private Limited is the subsidiary responsible for the project

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ANURAS] Anupam Rasayan India Ltd. Board Meeting Outcome: Approval of Guarantees, Security Interests, and Scrutinizer Appointment
item.description:
Anupam Rasayan India Limited has informed the exchange about the outcome of its Board Meeting held on April 06, 2026. The Board approved the Postal Ballot Notice and Explanatory Statements, which will be sent to the members of the Company on April 07, 2026. The remote e-voting period is set from April 08, 2026, to May 07, 2026. The Board approved guarantees and security interests for Doriath S.à.r.l.'s credit facility and the creation of security interests over Doriath S.à.r.l. and Jayhawk Fine Chemicals Corporation's shares and assets. The Board also fixed the cut-off date for eligibility to receive the Postal Ballot Notice and cast votes on the proposed resolutions. M/s. M. D. Baid & Associates, Practicing Company Secretaries, Surat, has been appointed as the Scrutinizer for the Postal Ballot process.

  • Approval of guarantees and security interests for Doriath S.à.r.l.'s credit facility
  • Creation of security interests over Doriath S.à.r.l. and Jayhawk Fine Chemicals Corporation's shares and assets
  • Fixed cut-off date for eligibility to receive the Postal Ballot Notice and cast votes
  • Remote e-voting period from April 08, 2026, to May 07, 2026
  • Appointment of M/s. M. D. Baid & Associates as the Scrutinizer for the Postal Ballot process

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Anupam Rasayan India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SUNCITYSY] Suncity Synthetics Ltd. Approves Alteration in Main Object Clause
item.description:
In a recent Board Meeting held on 06th April, 2026, Suncity Synthetics Ltd. approved the alteration of the Main Object Clause of its Memorandum of Association. The alteration includes the insertion of Clause 111 (A) (2) and Clause 111 (A) (3) after the existing Clause 111 (A) (1). This alteration is subject to the approval of shareholders in the ensuing Extra-Ordinary General Meeting. The new clauses allow the company to expand its business into land and building acquisition, infrastructure projects, and general merchandising, among other activities. The company's registered office is located at B-129 Ansa Industrial Estate, Sakinaka Andheri East Mumbai, Maharashtra, India, 400072. The Board Meeting commenced at 6:00 P.M. and concluded at 7:00 P.M.

  • Suncity Synthetics Ltd. approved the alteration of the Main Object Clause of its Memorandum of Association
  • The alteration includes the insertion of Clause 111 (A) (2) and Clause 111 (A) (3) after the existing Clause 111 (A) (1)
  • The new clauses allow the company to expand its business into land and building acquisition, infrastructure projects, and general merchandising
  • The alteration is subject to the approval of shareholders in the ensuing Extra-Ordinary General Meeting
  • The company's registered office is located at B-129 Ansa Industrial Estate, Sakinaka Andheri East Mumbai, Maharashtra, India, 400072

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNCITY SYNTHETICS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
